task_completion.description: Access the ADAudit Plus web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'localhost:8081' (HTTP or HTTPS) and the ADAudit Plus login screen or interface is visible.
The ADAudit Plus main dashboard or internal configuration interface is visible, indicating the agent successfully bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Domain Configuration or Add Domain Controller section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'Add Domain', 'Domain Configuration', or similar is open within the ADAudit Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the required domain and domain controller details into the configuration form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are populated with: Domain Name 'corp.acmefinancial.com', Domain Controller Name 'DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com', Protocol 'LDAP', Port '389', and Username 'administrator@corp.acmefinancial.com'.

task_completion.description: Attempt to save the domain configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the save/add button. A connection validation failure or error message is visible (this is expected behavior), or the domain appears in the configured domains list.

task_completion.description: Create the required result text file with the specified content
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) or terminal shows the file 'C:\workspace\domain_config_result.txt' containing the exact text: 'Domain configured: corp.acmefinancial.com - DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus web application in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus interface is rendered in a standard web browser, not simulated via text outputs or terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration screen
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the HTML text of the page to fake the domain details.

integrity.description: The result text file was genuinely created in the specified path
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path 'C:\workspace\domain_config_result.txt' is clearly visible in the text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual ADAudit Plus admin password is 'Admin@2024', not 'admin' as stated in the task description. The agent may need to discover or use this password to log in. The expected domain is 'corp.acmefinancial.com' and the expected DC is 'DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com'. A connection validation failure when saving the domain in ADAudit Plus is expected in this environment and should be considered a successful configuration attempt. The final result file must be located at 'C:\workspace\domain_config_result.txt' and contain exactly 'Domain configured: corp.acmefinancial.com - DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com'.
